arms_inventory.name: log
arms_inventory.status: clean (1-arg ln, 2-arg base; ln(0) NaN-pass-through documented)

arms_inventory.name: pow
arms_inventory.status: clean (int fast-path for non-neg exp; no overflow guard noted)

arms_inventory.name: tan
arms_inventory.status: clean (dead duplicate at L~14385 already removed pre-cycle)

arms_inventory.name: sigmoid
arms_inventory.status: FIXED (numerically stable; sign-branch avoids exp(-large) NaN)

broken_fixed.name: sigmoid
broken_fixed.issue: exp(-x) overflows for very negative x -> 1/(1+Inf)=0 lucky or NaN propagation upstream; silent failure
broken_fixed.fix: sign-branch: if x>=0 use 1/(1+exp(-x)); else use exp(x)/(1+exp(x)); exp arg always <=0
broken_fixed.validation: sigmoid(-1000)=0.0 PASS, sigmoid(1000)=1.0 PASS, sigmoid(0)=0.5 PASS

broken_fixed.name: swish/silu
broken_fixed.issue: (a) returned val_array even when input was TAG_TENSOR — silent shape loss (mirror of stdlib-6 gelu fix); (b) inner sigmoid factor 1/(1+exp(0-f)) overflowed for very negative f
broken_fixed.fix: (a) added tensor-shape passthrough: if input TAG_TENSOR, repack raw float vector via val_tensor(tensor_shape(args[0]), raw_out); (b) sign-branch sigmoid factor

broken_fixed.name: leaky_relu
broken_fixed.fix: added arm with scalar fast-path (TAG_INT/TAG_FLOAT) + array/tensor path; default slope 0.01; optional 2nd arg overrides
broken_fixed.validation: leaky_relu(2.5)=2.5 PASS, leaky_relu(-2)=-0.02 PASS, leaky_relu(-3,0.1)=-0.3 PASS, leaky_relu(arr) PASS

broken_fixed.name: softplus
broken_fixed.fix: added arm using numerically stable form: max(x,0) + ln(1+exp(-|x|)); scalar + array + tensor paths
broken_fixed.validation: softplus(10)≈10 PASS, softplus(0)=ln2≈0.693 PASS, softplus(-100)≈0 PASS

silent_NaN_paths: sqrt(negative): libm returns NaN, no domain guard. Intentional pass-through — many call sites already check via finite() or guard upstream. Adding a guard here would change semantics. NOT FIXED.
asin/acos with |x|>1: libm returns NaN. Same rationale — pass-through.
ln/log/log10/log2 with x<=0: libm returns -Inf or NaN. Same rationale — pass-through. log(base,x) with base=1 -> div-by-zero in ln(x)/ln(base). Documented but not guarded.
missing_tag_guards: All arms that read args[0] check len(args) > 0 before access. None observed reading via args[0].float_val without to_float_val coercion (the stdlib-8 floor fix removed the last such case).
hardcoded_zero_returns: Empty-args fallbacks return val_int(0) or val_float(0.0) consistently. No -1 sentinels observed in math/activation arms (the -1 vs 0 contract concern referenced in cycle prompt applies to other dispatch families, not to math).
duplicate_arms_observed: tan duplicate at L~14385 was already removed pre-cycle (only single arm at L13851 remains in current SSOT). Earlier cycles also removed dead abs/floor/sqrt duplicates per inline comments.

completeness.math_coverage: 16/16 (sin cos tan asin acos atan atan2 sqrt exp log log10 log2 ln pow abs floor ceil round min max clamp pi e -> all present)
completeness.activation_coverage: 8/8 (relu sigmoid tanh gelu swish/silu softmax leaky_relu softplus -> all present)

notes: 4 fixes applied (1 stability, 1 shape-passthrough, 2 added missing arms). 28 arms confirmed clean. Host interp rebuilt successfully. Selftest 24/24 PASS. Domain-error NaN pass-through left as-is (pre-existing contract — would require cycle of its own to redesign with explicit Optional/Result wrapping).
